choice: Pull BOTH endpoints per account: /portfolio for positions (Symbol + Quantity → upsert each as a kind-a marketable Holding by ticker, storing quantity, not market value) and /accounts/{id}/balances for the cash-account balance (→ a single kind-c cash Holding). Reconcile by ticker within the mapped Account: existing ticker → new observation row at sync as-of date; unseen ticker → auto-create the Holding (it's authoritative position data); a previously-synced ticker now absent → mark that Holding's position closed (zero quantity) rather than deleting, preserving the keep-every-row guarantee (777f97e5).
rationale: Storing share quantity (not E*TRADE's market value) is required by 9b7cc94d — we revalue daily off our own market-data series, so importing their dollar figure would diverge from manual/CSV holdings of the same ticker. Splitting positions (kind-a) from cash (kind-c) mirrors exactly the storage shapes ba4654aa already fixed for manual entry, so all three ingestion paths converge on one Holding model. Auto-creating unseen tickers is safe because position data is unambiguous (unlike the tax-bucket inference 7b0325f6 deliberately kept manual).
